login.heading: Sign in to Spotzy
login.error_generic: Sign in failed. Please try again.

register.heading: Create your account
register.password_error_short: Password is too short — at least 8 characters required
register.privacy_agreement: By creating an account, you agree to our Privacy Policy

stripe_gate.heading: Stripe payout account required
stripe_gate.description: To receive earnings as a Host, you must connect a Stripe payout account. This step is mandatory — you can't list spots or accept bookings without it.
stripe_gate.step_2: Verify your email with a one-time code
stripe_gate.step_3: Connect Stripe Connect — you'll be taken directly to Stripe onboarding after verification
stripe_gate.warning: Can't skip. Until Stripe onboarding is complete, the only pages you can access will be the setup screen and sign-out. If you close the browser mid-flow, you'll land back on the Stripe setup screen next time you sign in.
stripe_gate.footer_note: Powered by Stripe Connect — Spotzy never stores your banking details.

invoicing.heading: Billing & invoicing details
invoicing.description: These details will appear on invoices sent to spotters. You can update them later from your profile.

profile.stripe_pending_banner: Payout setup incomplete — you'll complete Stripe setup after verifying your email.
profile.pseudo_helper: This is what other users will see

review.cancellation_policy: Full refund if cancelled 24h+ before start. 50% refund within 12–24h. No refund within 12h.

booking.create_error: Could not create booking. Please try again.
booking.payment_init_error: Could not initialise payment. Please try again.

cancel.active_message: This booking is currently in progress.
cancel.tier_full: More than 24h before start — full refund
cancel.tier_none: Less than 12h before start — no refund

rating.locked_both: Both parties have reviewed. This review is now locked.
rating.locked_window: The review window has closed. This review is now locked.
rating.error_other_party: This review is now locked because both parties have reviewed.

chat.no_messages: No messages yet — start the conversation

errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.network_retry: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.

errors.UNKNOWN_ERROR: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again or contact support.

errors.EMAIL_ALREADY_EXISTS: An account with this email already exists.

errors.OUTSIDE_AVAILABILITY_WINDOW: The selected time is outside the availability window.

errors.VEHICLE_PLATE_TOO_LONG: Vehicle plate must be {maxLength} characters or less.

errors.RC_INSURANCE_NOT_APPROVED: Your RC insurance has not been approved.

hero.description: Book private parking spots by the hour — directly from local hosts near your destination.

how_it_works.heading: How it works
how_it_works.subheading: Book a spot in under 2 minutes
how_it_works.step_1_desc: Enter your destination and dates. Browse spots on a live map with real-time availability.
how_it_works.step_2_desc: Select your slot, review the price breakdown, and pay securely in a few taps.
how_it_works.step_3_desc: Get directions, message your host if needed, and park with confidence.

built_for_everyone.heading: Built for everyone
built_for_everyone.spotter_description: For drivers looking for reliable, affordable parking
built_for_everyone.host_description: For property owners who want to earn from unused space

agent_api.heading: Book parking with a single prompt.
agent_api.description: The Spotzy Agent API lets AI assistants like Claude, ChatGPT, and custom LangChain agents find, book, and manage parking on your behalf — through a natural-language interface backed by the same platform that powers spotzy.com.
agent_api.example_prompt: I'm driving to a meeting near Rue de la Loi 175 on Thursday 2–5pm. Book me a covered spot within 5 min walk, under €8 total. Use Spotzy.
agent_api.api_call_2_result: returned €7.20 for 3h on the closest match
agent_api.api_call_3_result: confirmed, access code sent to your email
agent_api.confirmation: Booked Rue de la Loi 178 (covered garage), 4 min walk, Thu 14:00–17:00, €7.20. Confirmation in your inbox.
agent_api.capability_1_desc: Find matching spots and get tiered pricing instantly.
agent_api.capability_2_desc: Create, modify, and cancel bookings on user behalf.
agent_api.capability_3_desc: Relay messages between spotters and hosts.
agent_api.capability_4_desc: Subscribe to events or plug into any MCP client.
agent_api.waitlist_cta: Launching in developer preview soon. Reach out to dev@spotzy.be to get an early API key.

quick_links.heading: Quick access
quick_links.register_desc: Get started as a spotter or host
quick_links.host_listing_desc: List your parking space in minutes
quick_links.list_spot_desc: Start earning from your parking space

cta.heading: Ready to find your spot?
cta.description: Join thousands of drivers and hosts already using Spotzy.

detail.unavailable_title: This spot is no longer available
detail.unavailable_message: The listing you are looking for has been removed.

create.photos_description: Upload photos of your parking spot. AI reviews them automatically — at least one must pass.
create.photo_too_large: Image is too large. Please use a photo smaller than 20 MB.
create.photo_validation_timeout: Validation timed out. Please try a different photo.
create.photo_validation_failed: Validation failed — try a clearer photo
create.availability_description: Define when your spot is open for booking. You must save before publishing.
create.availability_saved: Availability saved. You can now publish your listing.
create.availability_save_error: Failed to save availability. Please try again.
create.create_error: Failed to save listing. Please try again.
create.publish_error: Failed to publish. Please try again.

become_host.redirecting: Taking you to create your listing…
become_host.setup_title: Finish setting up your host account
become_host.setup_description: Connecting a Stripe payout account is required before you can list parking spots. This is a one-time setup and takes about 2 minutes.
become_host.required_description: Until you complete Stripe onboarding, you won't be able to create listings or receive payouts. You'll remain on this screen whenever you try to access host features.
become_host.stripe_note: Powered by Stripe Connect — your banking details are handled securely by Stripe, not stored by Spotzy.

deleted_items: Your name, email, phone number and pseudo
delete_account.kept_heading: What is kept for legal reasons:
delete_account.legal_explanation: Payment and booking records are retained for 7 years as required by Belgian accounting law (Code des sociétés). Your personal information is replaced with an anonymous identifier. You cannot be identified from these records.
delete_account.dpo_contact: Questions? Contact our Data Protection Officer at dpo@spotzy.com
delete_account.confirm_instruction: Type your email address to confirm

privacy.heading: Privacy & Data
privacy.delete_blocked_bookings: You have active booking(s) that must be completed or cancelled before deletion.
privacy.delete_blocked_disputes: You have open disputes that must be resolved before deletion.

search.heading: Search parking spots
search.no_results: No spots found. Try a different location or adjust your filters.

search_bar.date_error: End date cannot be before start date

booking_card.ending_soon: Ending soon — ends in less than 24h
